description_long: This is a cylindrical, vintage-style handbag constructed primarily from dark brown leather with visible wear and patina, suggesting age and frequent use. The bag features two sturdy, arched handles on top, reinforced with metal hardware, and a long, adjustable leather shoulder strap attached at both ends with metal rings. The main body is encircled by leather straps and metal buckles, which provide both structural support and a rugged aesthetic. A wide leather band wraps around the center, likely serving as a closure or reinforcement, and the ends of the cylinder are capped with circular leather panels. The surface shows scuffs and scratches, giving it a distressed, utilitarian look, and the overall design is reminiscent of a classic duffel or tool bag. No visible brand logos or decorative embellishments are present, emphasizing its functional, utilitarian character.
description: A cylindrical, vintage brown leather handbag with dual top handles, a long shoulder strap, and metal hardware, featuring a rugged, distressed finish.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the circular leather cap, buckle detail, and the attachment point of the shoulder strap.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full cylindrical body, dual top handles, long shoulder strap, and central leather band.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view highlighting the circular cap, buckle, and the trailing shoulder strap.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, but with the shoulder strap positioned differently and more detail visible on the leather bands and hardware.
attribute_strap_type: One long adjustable shoulder strap attached with metal rings at both ends, and two short fixed top handles for hand carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Buckle closure with a leather strap and metal buckle located at the end caps of the cylinder.
